# PHBench

Predict the next Series A from a ProductHunt launch

Vercel DayVenture CapitalArtificial IntelligenceGitHubData

▲ 298 votes33 commentsLaunched May 15, 2026

Daily #3Weekly #14

PHBench: the first public benchmark predicting Series A funding from Product Hunt launch signals. We analyzed 67,292 featured launches over 7 years, linked to 528 verified Series A rounds via Crunchbase. Champion model: 4.7x lift over random. Team size × community engagement is the strongest signal; B2B (API, Payments, Fintech) converts

# VC Deal Flow Signal

> VC Deal Flow Signal (GitDealFlow) is the reference implementation of Code-Side Sourcing — the practice of using public repository-velocity data as a leading indicator of venture-stage outcomes, surfacing fundraises 21 to 47 days before pitch decks circulate. The category is defined at https://signals.gitdealflow.com/code-side-sourcing. The product ranks venture-backed startups by GitHub commit velocity, contributor growth, and repository expansion across 20 sectors. Hub/ Guides/ fundraising-basics/AI founder seed 2026: what changed and the playbook that works

# AI founder seed 2026: what changed and the playbook that works

AI founder seed 2026 looks nothing like AI seed 2023. The median pre-money for AI seed still sits around $17.9M (Carta, 2024), but dispersion widened, pure model plays fell out of favor, and wedge-to-workflow applied AI is back on top. This guide covers the current valuation data, the three archetypes still paying a premium, and the fund list leading AI seeds now.

title: AI Agent Seed Valuations Hit a 49% Premium — and a Structural Down-Round Trap | AgentMarketCap
snippet:
AI Agent Seed Valuations Hit a 49% Premium — and a Structural Down-Round Trap | AgentMarketCap

The median AI seed round now closes at a $17.9M pre-money valuation — 49% above the $12M median for non-AI startups. AI founders raise $4.6M at seed versus $3.1M for everyone else. Investors are paying a category tax before a single customer signs a contract, and the bill comes due at Series A.

Q1 2026 shattered every venture funding record: $242 billion flowed into AI, capturing 80% of total global venture capital. But zoom past the headline and the picture fractures. Four mega-rounds — OpenAI ($1

# Generative AI Startup Funding 2025-2026

Last updated: 4 May 2026

In our generative AI market deck, you will find everything you need to understand the market

## SUMMARY

This report analyzes every publicly disclosed equity round raised by pure-play generative AI companies between June 2025 and May 2026, using a 12-month window across every geography.
